ddls:
CREATE TABLE "model_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model run */,
  "lp" REAL /* Log probability of the model */,
  "accept_stat" REAL /* Acceptance status of the model run (0 or 1) */,
  "stepsize" REAL /* Step size used in the model */,
  "treedepth" INTEGER /* Depth of the tree in the model */,
  "n_leapfrog" INTEGER /* Number of leapfrog steps taken */,
  "divergent" INTEGER /* Count of divergent transitions during the run */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy level of the model at the end of the run */,
  "mu" REAL /* Mean value predicted by the model */,
  "sigma" REAL /* Standard deviation of the predictions */,
  "height_pred" REAL /* Predicted height from the model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model being run */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used for the model run */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model run started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model run ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model run (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who initiated the run */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the model run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, data scientist, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter set */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model run associated with these parameters */,
  "stepsize" REAL /* Step size used in this parameter set */,
  "treedepth" INTEGER /* Tree depth for the model run */,
  "n_leapfrog" INTEGER /* Number of leapfrog steps for the model run */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model associated with the parameters */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used for the model parameters */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameters were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameters were last updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created/updated the parameters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_parameters_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES model_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the statistics entry */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model run this statistics belongs to */,
  "acceptance_rate" REAL /* Acceptance rate for the model run */,
  "divergent_count" INTEGER /* Count of divergent transitions during the model run */,
  "energy_level" REAL /* Final energy level after the run */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model associated with the statistics */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used for the statistics */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistics were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistics were last updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created/updated the statistics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_statistics_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES model_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "pred_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction entry */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model run this prediction belongs to */,
  "predicted_mu" REAL /* Mean predicted value */,
  "predicted_sigma" REAL /* Standard deviation of the predictions */,
  "predicted_height" REAL /* Height predicted by the model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model associated with the predictions */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used for the predictions */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the predictions were made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the predictions were last updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created/updated the predictions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pred_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES model_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model run being audited */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model being audited */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used for the audit */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the audit action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_audits_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES model_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the model version */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model run this version corresponds to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number following a semantic versioning scheme */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the model version was created */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model associated with the version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used for the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES model_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation result */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model run this result belongs to */,
  "final_energy" REAL /* Final energy level from the simulation */,
  "final_mu" REAL /* Final mean value from the simulation */,
  "final_sigma" REAL /* Final standard deviation from the simulation */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model associated with the simulation results */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used for the simulation results */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the simulation results were generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the simulation results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES model_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with this role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
